name: UPS System
descs:
Turn End: If at less than 3 [Charge] Count, gain +3 [Charge] Count next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at 3+ [Charge] Count, gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at less than <style="upgradeHighlight">4</style> [Charge] Count, gain +3 [Charge] Count next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at <style="upgradeHighlight">4+</style> [Charge] Count, gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at less than <style="upgradeHighlight">5</style> [Charge] Count, gain <style="upgradeHighlight">+4</style> [Charge] Count next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')

Turn End: If at <style="upgradeHighlight">5+</style> [Charge] Count, gain <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> [AttackDmgUp] next Turn Start. (including 'Unique Charge')
